recommendations.title: Bats
recommendations.overview: Genetically mutated bats escape and it's up to a bat expert and the local sheriff to stop them.

recommendations.title: April Fool's Day
recommendations.overview: When an April Fool's Day prank turns deadly, Desiree Cartier, her brother Blaine, and five of their friends all become the targets of a twisted kill who begins hunting them down one by one.

recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A college prank at an abandoned house accidentally awakens a frightening spirit.

recommendations.title: I Feel Pretty
recommendations.overview: A head injury causes a woman to develop an extraordinary amount of confidence and believe she's drop dead gorgeous.

recommendations.title: Tremors 3: Back to Perfection
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Survivalist Burt Gummer returns home to Perfection, to find that the little town has been shaken up again by morphing, man-eating Graboids.

recommendations.title: Blood Fest
recommendations.overview: Fans flock to a festival celebrating the most iconic horror movies, only to discover that the charismatic showman behind the event has a diabolical agenda.

recommendations.title: Insanitarium
recommendations.overview: After he's institutionalized in order to cover for his sister, a young man encounters a doctor who is turning his patients into flesh-eating psychopaths.

recommendations.title: Sheep & Wolves
recommendations.overview: In a magical faraway land, in a picturesque little village nestled among green meadows and rolling hills, lives a flock of carefree sheep. But their pastoral and stress-free life is interrupted when a pack of wolves sets up camp in the nearby ravine.

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.

recommendations.title: Alligator 2: The Mutation
recommendations.overview: A giant mutated alligator runs riot in a small town after the sewer system washes it into a lake.
